name: graph_streaming_encode_zero_edges_labeled
description: Streaming graph encode with symbols but NO edges, labeled trailer counts (SPEC 8.4.1). The edges: entry is always present and last even when the edge count is 0, so 2 targets, 1 related, 0 edges MUST emit counts=targets:2,related:1,edges:0. Identical input to 008; confirms the labeled form keeps the mandatory edges:0 anchor. Runners skip a graph-stream-encode fixture whose options they do not support.
